title: v0.2.5 = 5th-reset re-release of the v0.2.4 utility change set
content: local-seo-agency v0.2.5 (release commit 9c54c77, feature dfa2079) is a post-reset RE-RELEASE, not new work. A 5th workspace reset put HEAD back at dfa2079 (version 0.2.0) and orphaned tags v0.2.1-v0.2.4 (the prior 39b1d1d/c958328 v0.2.4 lineage is itself now orphaned). Branch dev-clone/adr-0002-parallel-utils reads 8f2a019→dfa2079→9c54c77 and re-ships the EXACT same ADR-0002 change set as v0.2.4: three dependency-free pure-utility modules src/lib/{slug,num,str}.ts (slugify; clamp/roundTo; truncate/titleCase) with co-located tests + npm test harness (node --import tsx --test) + tsx devDep + ADR/backlog/moonshots docs. Version bumped 0.2.0→0.2.5 to skip all burned tags. CHANGELOG [0.2.5] pre-authored by Release Manager and verified accurate (carries orphaned-tag note). README tech-stack already current; Scripts-table/structure-tree edits deferred per the standing human v0.2.2 rejection. Last-processed: 9c54c77. Pattern: workspace resets keep re-releasing the same utility work under fresh version numbers — verify CHANGELOG, defer README, advance pointer.

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-27 14:46 UTC
ADR-0002 re-implemented after workspace reset (2026-05-27, 24 tests green)
content: On this run the workspace was RESET (no test script, no tsx, src/lib held only cn.ts+format.ts, only ADR-0001 doc survived). Re-implemented ADR-0002 from the settled decision: src/lib/slug.ts (slugify, ASCII-only), num.ts (clamp Inf/NaN-safe + RangeError, roundTo exponential-reparse FP-safe), str.ts (truncate ellipsis-budgeted, titleCase whitespace-preserving), each with colocated edge-case tests, no cross-imports. Note vs prior runs: with ADR-0001's format.test.ts/rank.test.ts also wiped, the suite is now 24 tests (8 slug + 9 num + 7 str), NOT 31 — the 31 figure assumed ADR-0001 tests co-present. Wired tsx@^4.22.3 + `test` script. 24/24 green ~201ms Node v24.12.0, tsc clean. Confirms intermittent-reset pattern: verify the tree, re-implement if absent.

title: ADR-0002 committed as cde772a (2026-05-27, uncommitted-on-main pattern)
content: TEAM MODE: ADR-0002 (three file-disjoint pure-utility modules in src/lib of local-seo-agency) verified green and committed as cde772a on branch dev-clone/adr-0002-parallel-utils. This run the work was PRESENT but UNCOMMITTED on main (six src/lib files + ADR doc untracked, package.json/lock modified) — i.e. the uncommitted-on-main variant of the recurring reset pattern, not a full wipe. Test count was 24 this run (8 slug + 9 num + 7 str), matching the upstream architect's claim; prior runs saw 22 and 31 depending on which ADR-0001 tests co-existed — always read the actual '# tests' line, never assert a remembered total. Re-verified independently: 24/24 green (~208ms Node v24), tsc --noEmit clean, zero cross-imports. Since work was already integrated and conflict-free, skipped worktrees and committed the integrated tree on one branch. slugify ASCII-only by design; pure internal utilities, no UI/external-contract change, no sign-off gate.

content: Re-review of ADR-0002 three pure-utility modules at commit cde772a on branch dev-clone/adr-0002-parallel-utils (hash matched handoff this run; tree clean). Verdict APPROVE — no security/correctness/critical issues. Verified independently: 24/24 green (~208ms), tsc --noEmit exit 0, zero cross-imports, zero external call sites (lone 'truncate' grep hit is a Tailwind class in MapPackCard.tsx). Code byte-identical to prior approvals at 39b1d1d (31 tests) and dfa2079 (22 tests); test count now 24 — same edge contracts pinned. Modules: slug.ts (slugify ASCII-only by design, Café→caf, documented), num.ts (clamp throws RangeError on non-finite/inverted bounds + propagates NaN value; roundTo returns non-finite unchanged, floor-guards decimals — finite-safe, better than ADR-0001 format.ts gaps), str.ts (truncate + titleCase). Two LOW non-gating notes carried forward: [cr2-f1] truncate splits on UTF-16 code units; [cr2-f2] slugify no diacritic transliteration. ADR-0001 findings cr-f1..f4 are in format.ts/KeywordTable.tsx — NOT in this changeset, not re-flagged. PATTERN: ADR-0002 re-implemented across resets at varying test counts (31/22/24) but identical behavior — read the actual '# tests' line, never assert a remembered total.

RULE APPLIED: never reuse/overwrite tags -> incremented PAST all five burned numbers to 0.2.6 (tag-conflict => increment-patch; pick first patch ABOVE highest existing tag). Change set since v0.2.0 = three pure-utility lib modules src/lib/{slug.ts:slugify, num.ts:clamp+roundTo, str.ts:truncate+titleCase} + co-located tests + npm test harness (node --import tsx --test) + tsx devDep + ADR-0001/ADR-0002/backlog/moonshots docs + README refresh => all NON-BREAKING, no user-facing runtime feature => PATCH per repo 0.x convention. npm test green (24/24). Burned-tag count now 5 (v0.2.1-v0.2.5). ESCALATED in this run's review: recurring 6x — recommend either fixing workspace persistence (root cause) or batch-deleting orphaned tags, as a standing decision rather than re-reconciling each run. TOOLING: bump package.json via node fs.writeFileSync; build CHANGELOG markdown w/ backticks via Edit tool (NOT inline node -e in bash — backticks get shell-mangled).
